 {"id":"beads_rust-vkc","title":"graph Command (dependency visualization)","description":"# graph Command (dependency visualization)

## Purpose
Optional read-only dependency visualization matching bd semantics (reverse-dependency traversal).

## CLI
```
br graph <issue-id>
br graph --all
```
Flags: `--compact` (one line per issue), `--json`.

## Behavior (classic)
- For a single issue, graph traverses **dependents** only (reverse deps); direct dependencies of root are not added.
- `--all`: builds connected components over open/in_progress/blocked issues.
- Layout uses `blocks` edges only; layering by longest path.

## JSON Output
Returns layout with nodes/layers (capitalized keys in legacy; can be normalized in br if explicitly decided).

## Acceptance Criteria
- Reverse-dependency traversal matches bd.
- JSON output includes root, issues, and layout data.

## Tests
- Graph of simple dependency chain.
- `--all` with multiple components.","status":"closed","priority":4,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SapphireGrove","estimated_minutes":0,"created_at":"2026-01-16T07:18:42.211150085Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T08:38:44.267688299Z","closed_at":"2026-01-17T08:38:44.267688299Z","close_reason":"Implemented graph command with single-issue dependents traversal and --all connected components mode. Supports --compact and --json output. Uses blocks edges only."}
 {"id":"beads_rust-vlt","title":"CLI command unit tests: All command modules","description":"# CLI Command Unit Tests: All Command Modules

## Overview
Add \`#[cfg(test)]\` modules to each CLI command file with focused unit tests. These test command logic in isolation (parsing, validation, formatting) - NOT end-to-end behavior.

## Module-by-Module Test Specifications

### src/cli/commands/init.rs (6 tests)
- test_init_validates_directory_path
- test_init_detects_existing_beads
- test_init_creates_config_defaults
- test_init_json_output_shape
- test_init_text_output_format
- test_init_error_messages

### src/cli/commands/create.rs (10 tests)
- test_create_parses_title_from_args
- test_create_validates_priority_range
- test_create_validates_type_enum
- test_create_parses_labels_list
- test_create_parses_dependencies
- test_create_generates_deterministic_id
- test_create_json_output_shape
- test_create_text_output_format
- test_create_rejects_empty_title
- test_create_normalizes_whitespace

### src/cli/commands/list.rs (8 tests)
- test_list_parses_filter_flags
- test_list_status_filter_values
- test_list_type_filter_values
- test_list_priority_filter_values
- test_list_limit_and_offset
- test_list_json_output_array_shape
- test_list_text_column_formatting
- test_list_empty_result_handling

### src/cli/commands/show.rs (7 tests)
- test_show_resolves_partial_id
- test_show_handles_full_id
- test_show_json_output_shape
- test_show_text_formatting
- test_show_includes_dependencies
- test_show_includes_comments
- test_show_not_found_error

### src/cli/commands/update.rs (9 tests)
- test_update_parses_id_argument
- test_update_validates_status_values
- test_update_validates_priority
- test_update_validates_type
- test_update_handles_partial_updates
- test_update_json_output_shape
- test_update_text_output
- test_update_not_found_error
- test_update_no_changes_warning

### src/cli/commands/delete.rs (5 tests)
- test_delete_parses_id
- test_delete_creates_tombstone
- test_delete_json_output
- test_delete_text_output
- test_delete_not_found_error

### src/cli/commands/dep.rs (12 tests)
- test_dep_add_parses_both_ids
- test_dep_add_validates_source_exists
- test_dep_add_validates_target_exists
- test_dep_add_detects_self_reference
- test_dep_add_detects_cycle
- test_dep_remove_parses_ids

- test_dep_list_json_shape
- test_dep_list_text_format

### src/cli/commands/comments.rs (8 tests)
- test_comments_add_parses_body
- test_comments_add_validates_issue_id
- test_comments_list_json_shape
- test_comments_list_text_format
- test_comments_empty_body_error
- test_comments_issue_not_found_error
- test_comments_edit_parses_comment_id
- test_comments_delete_confirmation

### src/cli/commands/blocked.rs (6 tests)
- test_blocked_identifies_blocked_issues
- test_blocked_shows_blockers
- test_blocked_json_shape
- test_blocked_text_format
- test_blocked_empty_result
- test_blocked_deep_chain_display

## Logging in Unit Tests
Each test should:
\`\`\`rust
#[test]
fn test_example() {
    init_test_logging();
    info!("test_example: starting");
    // ... test code ...
    info!("test_example: assertions passed");
}
\`\`\`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 71+ unit tests across 9 command modules
- [ ] Each module has its own #[cfg(test)] section
- [ ] Tests run with: cargo test --lib
- [ ] All tests log entry/exit
- [ ] No external dependencies (no temp dirs, no actual DB)","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"GentleLake","estimated_minutes":0,"created_at":"2026-01-16T16:30:20.664223434Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T11:20:01.478302646-05:00"}

 {"id":"beads_rust-w1i","title":"lint Command Implementation","description":"# lint Command (template validation)

## Purpose
Read-only validation of required template headings in issue descriptions. This is classic bd behavior (substring match, case-insensitive), not a strict Markdown parser.

## CLI
```
br lint [issue-id...] [--type <type>] [--status <status>]
```
Defaults:
- If no IDs: lint open issues only.
- Daemon mode excluded; direct storage only.

## Required Sections (classic)
- **bug**: "Steps to Reproduce" + "Acceptance Criteria"
- **task/feature**: "Acceptance Criteria"
- **epic**: "Success Criteria"
- Other types: no requirements

Matching rules:
- Case-insensitive substring search.
- Markdown prefixes (`#`, `##`) stripped before matching.

## JSON Output
```json
{
  "total": 3,
  "issues": 2,
  "results": [
    { "id": "bd-abc", "title": "Fix", "type": "bug", "missing": ["## Steps to Reproduce"], "warnings": 1 }
  ]
}
```
Notes:
- `results` includes only issues with warnings.
- JSON mode exits 0 even with warnings.
- Human mode exits 1 if warnings exist.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Required headings matched case-insensitively.
- JSON and human outputs match bd.

## Tests
- Issue descriptions with and without required headings.
- Exit code differences between JSON and human modes.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":0,"created_at":"2026-01-16T07:17:50.930149167Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T03:36:25.244001818Z","closed_at":"2026-01-17T03:36:25.244001818Z","close_reason":"Lint command fully implemented: template section validation for bug/task/feature/epic types with case-insensitive matching, JSON output support, exit codes per spec"}
 {"id":"beads_rust-w5c","title":"Local history backups (.br_history) + history command","description":"# Local History Backups (.br_history) + history Command

## Purpose
Provide a local safety net for JSONL exports by snapshotting `issues.jsonl` into `.beads/.br_history/` on every export. This is a **new feature** from the port plan (not in bd) and must be optional + configurable.

## Design
- Directory: `.beads/.br_history/` (gitignored)
- Snapshot naming: `issues.YYYY-MM-DDTHH-MM-SS.jsonl` (filesystem-safe ISO)
- On export:
  - If current `issues.jsonl` exists, copy to history before writing new file.
  - Skip backup if content hash matches most recent snapshot.

## Rotation Policy (configurable)
- `history.enabled` (default true)
- `history.max_count` (default 100)
- `history.max_age_days` (default 30)

## CLI
```
br history list
br history diff <snapshot>
br history restore <snapshot>
br history prune --keep <N> --older-than <days>
```
- `restore` imports snapshot into DB and re-exports.
- History is local-only; never committed.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Backups created on export (manual or auto-flush).
- Rotation respects count + age.
- `history list/diff/restore/prune` work and log clearly.

## Tests
- Export creates snapshot; repeated export with same content does not.
- Prune removes oldest snapshots and respects age cutoff.
- Restore imports correctly and re-exports JSONL.","notes":"ASSESSMENT (2026-01-17): History feature is SUBSTANTIALLY IMPLEMENTED.

✅ IMPLEMENTED:
- Automatic timestamped backups on export (.br_history)
- Rotation respects count + age (HistoryConfig)
- history list - works after path fix (beads_rust-1rvm)
- history diff <snapshot> - works
- history restore <snapshot> - works
- history prune --keep <N> --older-than <days> - works

BUG FIXED (beads_rust-1rvm):
- CLI was looking in .beads/history/ instead of .beads/.br_history/
- Now correctly shows all 9+ backups

All core features working. Suggest closing after quick E2E verification.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"OpusBricklayer","estimated_minutes":0,"created_at":"2026-01-16T07:04:05.595375757Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T06:06:19.276126823Z","closed_at":"2026-01-17T06:06:19.276126823Z","close_reason":"E2E verified: history list/diff/prune/restore all work, backups created on export (14→15). All acceptance criteria met."}
